subtitle: Multiclass classification on sampled CICIoT2023-style network flows — baseline vs tree ensembles vs neural network.
course_line: Cybersecurity / ML project — model comparison / PDF-style metrics

dataset.name: CICIoT2023 (merged CSVs, per-class sampling in ingest)

split_note: Stratified train/validation/test (70% / 15% / 15%). Same preprocessing (StandardScaler + LabelEncoder) for all models.

models.name: MLP (PyTorch)
models.role: Small net — dropout + weighted CE + early stopping

metric_help.macro_f1: Unweighted mean of class F1 scores — sensitive to rare classes.
metric_help.weighted_f1: F1 weighted by support — dominated by frequent classes.
metric_help.benign_fpr: Among true BENIGN samples, fraction predicted as any attack (lower is better for false alarms).
metric_help.accuracy: Overall correct predictions (can be misleading under imbalance).
